_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: LeviLamina
author: eggs@purpleflaghosting.com
description: LeviLamina 是一個非官方的模組加載器，旨在為 Minecraft 基岩版提供不可或缺的 API 支援。它擁有全面的 API、一系列的實用介面、強大的事件系統以及對基礎介面的全面支援。LeviLamina 提供了廣泛的 API、強大的事件系統和豐富的封裝開發基礎設施介面，為增強 Minecraft 基岩版的遊戲特色和功能奠定了堅實的基礎。透過利用模組，擴展基岩版功能的過程變得輕鬆自如，並具有用戶友好的開發過程和適應性強的方法。

installation.script:
# Install required packages
apt update
apt install -y lsb-release xvfb unzip jq

# Install wine
wget -O /etc/apt/keyrings/winehq-archive.key https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/winehq.key
wget -NP /etc/apt/sources.list.d/ https://dl.winehq.org/wine-builds/debian/dists/$(lsb_release -sc 2>/dev/null)/winehq-$(lsb_release -sc 2>/dev/null).sources
apt update
apt install --no-install-recommends winehq-stable cabextract -y

export WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine
mkdir -p $WINEPREFIX


# Setup display
export DISPLAY=:0
Xvfb :0 -screen 0 1024x768x16 &




# Install Winetricks
echo "Installing winetricks"
wget -q -O /usr/sbin/winetricks https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Winetricks/winetricks/master/src/winetricks && chmod +x /usr/sbin/winetricks

echo "Installing mono"
wget -q -O $WINEPREFIX/mono.msi https://dl.winehq.org/wine/wine-mono/9.1.0/wine-mono-9.1.0-x86.msi
WINEDLLOVERRIDES="mscoree,mshtml=" wine msiexec /i $WINEPREFIX/mono.msi /qn /quiet /norestart /log $WINEPREFIX/mono_install.log

# Install dotnet
echo "Installing dotnet"
winetricks -q dotnet10           


# Setup tty width so wine console output doesn't prematurely wrap
stty columns 250


cd /mnt/server || { echo "Failed to change directory"; exit 1; }

# Install lip
LIP_VERSION="$(wget -qO- https://api.github.com/repos/futrime/lip/releases/latest | jq -r '.tag_name[1:]')"
LIP_URL="https://github.com/futrime/lip/releases/download/v${LIP_VERSION}/lip-${LIP_VERSION}-win-x64.zip"
wget "$LIP_URL" -O lip.zip
unzip -o lip.zip lip.exe
rm lip.zip


if [ -n "$VERSION" ] && [ "$VERSION" != "latest" ]; then
    wine lip.exe install github.com/LiteLDev/LeviLamina@"$VERSION"
else
    wine lip.exe install github.com/LiteLDev/LeviLamina
fi


echo "Server Installed"

if [ -f "lip-install.txt" ]; then
    for package in $(cat "lip-install.txt" ); do
        echo "Installing ${package} from lip-install.txt"
        wine lip.exe install "${package}"
    done
    echo "Packages installed"
fi

variables.name: 版本
variables.description: 要安裝的 LeviLamina 版本，格式為 x.y.z。留空或輸入 "latest" 將安裝最新版本。

variables.name: 遊戲模式
variables.description: 允許的值："survival" (生存)、"creative" (創造) 或 "adventure" (冒險)

variables.name: 難度
variables.description: 允許的值："peaceful" (和平)、"easy" (簡單)、"normal" (一般) 或 "hard" (困難)

variables.name: 最大玩家數
variables.description: 伺服器允許加入的最大玩家數

variables.name: 世界名稱
variables.description: 伺服器要使用的世界/關卡名稱
